name: GCS To GCS Text Analyzer
description: A streaming pipeline that checks a GCS bucket for new files, process them by counting every word, and writes these results to another file in the bucket, while also moving the processed files

parameters.name: inputPath
parameters.label: Input GCS Path
parameters.helpText: The GCS file pattern to monitor for new files (e.g., gs://my-bucket/inbox/*.txt).

parameters.name: outputPath
parameters.label: Results Output Path
parameters.helpText: The GCS prefix where processing results will be written (e.g., gs://my-bucket/results/output).

parameters.name: processedPath
parameters.label: Archive Path
parameters.helpText: The GCS folder where original files are moved after successful processing (e.g., gs://my-bucket/archive/).

parameters.name: pollInterval
parameters.label: Polling Interval (seconds)
parameters.helpText: How often the pipeline checks for new files in the input path.
